artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log — 100 lines, 2026-05-11 09:00–10:00 UTC, bucketed in 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <Chart kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" x="bucket" y="errors" data='[{"bucket":"09:00","errors":0},{"bucket":"09:10","errors":1},{"bucket":"09:20","errors":5},{"bucket":"09:30","errors":11},{"bucket":"09:40","errors":4},{"bucket":"09:50","errors":1}]' height="360" />
  <Text variant="muted">22 ERROR lines total, matching the hourly_summary line at 09:59:41 (errors=22, error_rate=0.021). Errors cluster in the 09:30 bucket, coinciding with a pricing circuit breaker opening (line 57) and a run of 503s from /catalog.</Text>
</Card>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log — 100 lines, 2026-05-11 09:00–10:00 UTC, bucketed in 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <Chart kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" x="bucket" y="errors" data='[{"bucket":"09:00","errors":0},{"bucket":"09:10","errors":1},{"bucket":"09:20","errors":5},{"bucket":"09:30","errors":11},{"bucket":"09:40","errors":4},{"bucket":"09:50","errors":1}]' height="360" />
  <Text variant="muted">22 ERROR lines total, matching the hourly_summary line at 09:59:41 (errors=22, error_rate=0.021). Errors cluster in the 09:30 bucket, coinciding with a pricing circuit breaker opening (line 57) and a run of 503s from /catalog.</Text>
